title: Setters should not return values
description: Setters should not return valuesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugWhy is this an issue?More InfoIn JavaScript, a setter is a special type of function that is used to set the value of a property on an object. Setters are defined using thesetkeyword followed by the name of the property that the setter is associated with.To set the property, we simply assign a value to it as if it were a regular property. The setter function is automatically called with the value that we assign to the property.Functions declared with thesetkeyword will automatically return the values they were passed.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
